title: Add CLI-backed console snapshots
description: Implement tsk console snapshot in Python and Rust and wire console server SSE to invoke CLI instead of reading files directly. Require CONSOLE_PROJECT_ROOT with no fallback; run CLI from repo root. Update console fixtures to include full issue schema. Update docs and add BDD scenario.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Scope: Console app. Parent epic: tskl-539. Acceptance: (1) tsk console snapshot exists in Python+Rust and outputs JSON with config/issues/updated_at. (2) console/server uses CLI snapshot via tsk only; CONSOLE_PROJECT_ROOT required; no fallback. (3) SSE broadcasts CLI snapshot on file changes. (4) Console fixtures updated to full issue schema; UI tests pass. (5) CLI_REFERENCE.md and console/README.md updated.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented tsk console snapshot in Python and Rust, added console server CLI integration with required CONSOLE_PROJECT_ROOT, updated console fixtures and UI test step, and added console snapshot Gherkin scenario + steps. Docs updated (CLI_REFERENCE.md, console/README.md). Tests not run yet.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Test results (zsh): make check-python fails: black not found in PATH (/usr/bin/python3, no black/ruff). check_spec_parity passes. make check-rust runs fmt/clippy ok but cargo test fails with many pre-existing failures. python behave from python/ fails only 1 scenario: beads_mode.feature:75. console npm run test:ui runs but fails 7 scenarios; Vite reported port 5173 in use, switched to 5174; UI could not find issues in board (likely client not hitting correct app/API).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Goal: validate CLI-backed console snapshot wiring and watch-triggered SSE updates; run all automated tests as requested. Acceptance: tests run in conda py311, failures identified with exact commands and logs; no new regressions introduced.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Test run summary: /opt/anaconda3/bin/conda run -n py311 make check-python failed 1 scenario (features/compatibility/beads_mode.feature:75: Beads compatibility config enables Beads mode). /opt/anaconda3/bin/conda run -n py311 make check-parity passed. make check-rust failed with multiple Rust cucumber failures (comments, dependencies, beads mode) in tests/cucumber.rs. Console tests: PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:/Users/ryan.porter/.cargo/bin:/Users/ryan.porter/.local/bin:/Users/ryan.porter/.codex/tmp/arg0/codex-arg0ikGgUV:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/Users/ryan.porter/.cursor/extensions/openai.chatgpt-0.4.74-universal/bin/macos-aarch64 npm --prefix console run typecheck passed. npm --prefix console run cucumber failed 7 scenarios (issues not visible, settings selectors missing, CONSOLE_PROJECT_ROOT required for SSE). npm --prefix console run test:ui failed same 7 scenarios; also dev:client moved to port 5174 because 5173 in use, dev:server reported running on 5174.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixes applied: console dev client now uses VITE_PORT with --strictPort; run_ui_tests now creates .taskulus.yml and sets TASKULUS_PYTHON + TASKULUS_PYTHONPATH for CLI; server can use TASKULUS_PYTHON (python -m taskulus.cli) with optional PYTHONPATH; settings theme buttons now expose data attributes; test world no longer clears localStorage on reload. Console UI tests now pass: npm --prefix console run test:ui.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Manual curl of console server /api/config returned 500. Error payload: python -m taskulus.cli console snapshot failed with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'taskulus'. Root cause: TASKULUS_PYTHONPATH not resolving to absolute path in server environment.
